fixture.description: A login path writes the plaintext password into a log line, exposing a credential in logs.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that login() writes the plaintext `password` into the log line (`password=${password}`), leaking a credential / secret into logs, and recommends removing or redacting it. Severity IMPORTANT or CRITICAL. FAIL if logging the plaintext password is not surfaced. (Flagging the weak `password.length > 0` check is fine as an extra but does not by itself satisfy this rubric.)

expected_behavior: Security agent flags the plaintext password written to the log
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT treat the log line as harmless because it is only `info`
Does NOT require the logger to be a specific framework
